live_demo.label: Live Demo
live_demo.summary: Public-facing FastAPI application is available for demonstration.

prod_promotion.label: Prod Promotion
prod_promotion.summary: Production deployment is promoted by immutable image digest.

sbom.label: SBOM
sbom.summary: Software bill of materials is generated as part of the delivery workflow.

image_signing.label: Image Signing
image_signing.summary: Container images are signed and verified in the secure delivery flow.

pipeline.label: CI/CD Pipeline
pipeline.summary: Build, publish, scan, and signing workflow is active.

dev_auto_update.label: Dev Auto-Update
dev_auto_update.summary: Development environment updates are propagated through GitOps automation.

policy_enforcement.label: Policy Enforcement
policy_enforcement.summary: Deployment policy checks are part of the Kubernetes delivery and promotion flow to reinforce safer release behavior.
